artifactRefs.description: Focused API/package/product-commerce and memory-loop test report with command outputs and review evidence.

contractCoverage.contractRef: G008 product import enrichment and fail-closed fallback
contractCoverage.obligation: Deterministic Naver import metadata must enrich products; metadata-poor imports must be blocked; valid percent signs must not crash parsing; manual fallback must appear only for 422 PRODUCT_IMPORT_BLOCKED.

contractCoverage.contractRef: G008 ShoppingConnect link management and placement
contractCoverage.obligation: ShoppingConnect links must support create, edit, package clearing, activation toggling, delete, freshness check, and inactive-link exclusion from generated placement.

contractCoverage.contractRef: G008 performance-to-package binding and Company Memory reuse
contractCoverage.obligation: Performance recording must require explicit content_package_id; revenue/category evidence must be active-link based, deduped, and split; Company Memory must use weighted aggregation and Hermes usage must increment only after successful new memo creation.
Product, ShoppingConnect, and draft persistence errors must not be catch-all masked as not-found; only Prisma P2025 maps to null/not-found.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: npm test -- tests/p2-contract.test.ts tests/p3-contract.test.ts tests/p4-contract.test.ts tests/products-screen-contract.test.ts tests/hq-screen-contract.test.ts; npm run typecheck; focused npx biome check over changed G008 files

adversarialCases.contractRef: G008 product import enrichment and fail-closed fallback
adversarialCases.scenario: Naver Shopping URL lacks deterministic product metadata.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Import parsing throws PRODUCT_IMPORT_BLOCKED:missing_product_metadata instead of creating a generic product.

adversarialCases.contractRef: G008 product import enrichment and fail-closed fallback
adversarialCases.scenario: Import metadata contains a legitimate percent sign such as query=100%25 cotton.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Product name remains 100% cotton and parsing does not throw URIError.

adversarialCases.contractRef: G008 product import enrichment and fail-closed fallback
adversarialCases.scenario: Import API returns non-OK error that is not 422 PRODUCT_IMPORT_BLOCKED.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Manual fallback is hidden and the UI reports automatic import failure rather than masking the error as manual fallback.

adversarialCases.contractRef: G008 ShoppingConnect link management and placement
adversarialCases.scenario: Owner edits link fields, clears package, toggles active state, deletes, and marks checked.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Schemas/API/UI support PATCH content_package_id:null, is_active toggling, DELETE, and mark_checked without stale state drift.

adversarialCases.contractRef: G008 ShoppingConnect link management and placement
adversarialCases.scenario: A content package has active and inactive ShoppingConnect products.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Inactive products are excluded from blog/search placement inputs and from performance/memory category attribution.

adversarialCases.contractRef: G008 performance-to-package binding and Company Memory reuse
adversarialCases.scenario: Multiple active links include duplicate categories plus another category on one performance log.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Revenue/category evidence dedupes duplicate categories and splits direct revenue across distinct active categories.

adversarialCases.contractRef: G008 performance-to-package binding and Company Memory reuse
adversarialCases.scenario: Persisted Company Memory contains multiple rows for the same pattern with different sample counts.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Hermes context aggregation uses sample-count weighted averages, not unweighted group averages or arbitrary take limits.

adversarialCases.contractRef: G008 performance-to-package binding and Company Memory reuse
adversarialCases.scenario: Hermes scan is idempotent, budget-blocked, or fails before creating a new memo.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Company Memory usedInRecommendations increments only after at least one new memo is successfully created.

adversarialCases.scenario: Product, ShoppingConnect, or draft persistence write fails for a reason other than Prisma P2025 not-found.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The service rethrows the error instead of returning null/false that the route would convert to 404.
